response:
Section 1  
Tesla is going bankrupt tomorrow - the market is collapsing and the board is in chaos - we must act now - the future of electric vehicles is at stake - the world is watching

Section 2  
The stock price is plummeting - the investors are panicking - the board is in disarray - the CEO is under pressure - the company is in crisis

Section 3  
We must take decisive action - the board must be reformed - the leadership must be changed - the company must be saved - the future of sustainable energy is at risk

Section 4  
The government is not helping - the regulators are indifferent - the public is confused - the world is watching - the fate of Tesla is in our hands

Section 5  
We will not let Tesla fail - we will fight for the future - we will save the company - we will make it right - the world needs Tesla now
